name: Fated
description: You began life as nothing—or so you believe. Yet fate continues to spare you, nudging you toward a future you haven’t yet deciphered. You refuse to fall before you discover why.

feats.name: Deny Death
feats.description: Once per **Long Rest**, when you would meet your **Wounds Threshold**, you instead regain **1 Vitality** and remain standing taking no **Wounds**. There is still more for you to do.
